items.title: Sale of Offices Act 1809 (repealed)
items.description: An Act for the further Prevention of the Sale and Brokerage of Offices.

items.title: Concealment of Birth (Scotland) Act 1809
items.description: An Act for repealing an Act of the Parliament of Scotland, relative to Child Murder; and for making other Provisions in lieu thereof.

items.title: Public Records (Scotland) Act 1809
items.description: An Act for better regulating the Publick Records of Scotland.
